items.description: Up to 100 new menu items to add.

compare_at_price_amount.description: Regular/pre-sale price. Set alongside price_amount to run a sale.

price.description: Legacy alias accepted for compatibility. Prefer price_amount.

price_amount.description: Canonical price field for menu items.

sale_ends_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale ends. Optional.

sale_starts_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale becomes active. Optional.

section.description: Required menu section name, for example Cocktails, Mains, or Desserts.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

asset_id.description: Media asset ID of the uploaded Markdown document.

question.description: Optional question to answer using only the document content. Omit for a summary.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

creditsRemaining.description: AI credits remaining after document analysis.

stats.description: Structural stats detected in the document.

location_id.description: Optional location scope when the homepage content is location-specific.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

location_id.description: Optional location scope when the homepage content is location-specific.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

entities.description: Which kinds of content to copy. menu_items requires menus to also be listed, since copied items attach to newly copied menus.

include_translations.description: Copy existing translations for menus/menu items/site content along with the source-locale content. Defaults to true.

new_location_title.description: Title for a brand-new location to create and copy content into. Omit if using target_location_id instead.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

source_location_id.description: Location to copy content from. Use list_locations to find ids.

target_location_id.description: Existing location to copy content into. Omit if using new_location_title instead.

copied.description: Per-entity-type counts of what was copied.

content_blocks.description: Canonical ordered article blocks. This is the source of truth for FAQ, How-To, media, and other structured content.

data.description: Typed block payload. Markdown requires markdown plus editor_mode (rich for visual-editor-safe prose, source for tables/raw HTML). FAQ uses items; How-To uses steps; images retain asset_id, alt, caption, and resolved media metadata.

scheduled_for.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone. Publishes automatically when due.

seo_keywords.description: Comma-separated SEO keyword phrases when useful.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO/browser-tab title override. Falls back to the post title if unset.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

tags.description: Searchable topical tags. Use a short, deduplicated list; category remains the primary public grouping.

visibility.description: Unlisted posts work by direct URL but are excluded from indexes, search, feeds, and sitemap.

document_updated_at.description: Concurrency token required when replacing content_blocks.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

hide_from_nav.description: Excludes this post from nav rendering only. Does NOT deindex it or remove it from the sitemap — use robots="noindex,..." for that.

nav_order.description: Sort position within its section. Lower sorts first.

nav_section.description: Top-level sidebar section label for this site's blog. Falls back to category if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

nav_section_order.description: Sort position of the section itself among all sections.

nav_title.description: Sidebar label override. Falls back to the post title if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

domain.description: Custom domain to add, e.g. "www.example.com" or "example.com".

include_www.description: If true (default), provision both www and the apex domain as a pair.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

domains.description: Newly created domain records (www + apex pair).

instructions.description: DNS records to add at the registrar.

available_note.description: Short urgency or availability note, e.g. "Last 2 spots".

body.description: Main long-form description for the experience. Use this for the full narrative, inclusions, what guests can expect, and important details that do not have a dedicated field.

canonical_url.description: Optional canonical URL override. Leave unset for the default self-referencing canonical.

compare_at_price_amount.description: Regular/pre-sale price. Set alongside price_amount to run a sale.

featured.description: Whether this experience should be highlighted in featured placements.

featured_sort_order.description: Lower numbers sort earlier among featured experiences.

highlights.description: Short bullet-point highlights for the experience. Use one concise string per highlight.

image_asset_id.description: Primary image asset id from get_site_media_assets.

images.description: Optional additional media gallery for this experience. Use this for extra photos or videos beyond the primary image/video.

included_items.description: Explicit list of what is included. Use one concise string per included item.

location_id.description: Optional location id. If omitted, the site primary location is used when available. If the site has no primary location yet, create a location first or pass a valid location_id.

max_capacity.description: Maximum guest count for a single booking or session.

meeting_point.description: Specific arrival or check-in instruction for guests.

og_image_asset_id.description: Asset id from get_site_media_assets for this experience's social share image. Falls back to the first gallery image, then image_asset_id, if unset.

price.description: Optional display override for pricing text, e.g. "Ask us" or "Free". Leave both price and price_amount unset entirely (not "Ask us") for group/custom-quote experiences — that triggers the public page's "Contact us" inquiry flow instead of a Reserve Now button; setting price to text like "Ask us" instead just shows that text as the price label with normal booking still enabled.

price_amount.description: Numeric price amount when the experience has a concrete price.

recurring_slots.description: Per-weekday time slots in HH:MM format when the schedule differs by day. Keys must be full weekday names such as Monday or Friday. Takes priority over time_slots when set.

robots.description: Search engine indexing directive. Leave unset for the default index,follow.

sale_ends_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale ends. Optional.

sale_starts_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale becomes active. Optional.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

slot_end.description: Convenience: auto-generate slots up to and including this "HH:MM" end time.

slot_interval_minutes.description: Convenience: interval in minutes between generated slots, e.g. 30.

slot_start.description: Convenience: auto-generate slots from this "HH:MM" start time. Used with slot_end and slot_interval_minutes instead of typing time_slots by hand.

slot_weekday.description: If set alongside slot_start/slot_end/slot_interval_minutes, the generated slots are assigned to recurring_slots for this weekday instead of the flat time_slots list.

sort_order.description: Lower numbers sort earlier in lists.

tagline.description: Short one-line hook shown in cards and summaries. Keep this concise; do not dump the full description here.

time_slots.description: Flat daily time slots in HH:MM format, used when the same schedule applies every day. Ignored if recurring_slots is set.

video_asset_id.description: Primary video asset id from get_site_media_assets.

what_to_bring.description: Explicit list of what guests should bring or prepare. Use one concise string per item.

canonical_url.description: Optional canonical URL override. Leave unset for the default self-referencing canonical.

facebook_url.description: Full Facebook page URL for this location, e.g. https://facebook.com/yourpage. Include the https:// scheme.

foodpanda_url.description: Foodpanda URL for this location. Must be a full http:// or https:// URL — bare domains are rejected.

grab_url.description: Grab delivery/booking URL for this location. Must be a full http:// or https:// URL — bare domains are rejected.

instagram_url.description: Full Instagram profile URL for this location, e.g. https://instagram.com/yourhandle. Include the https:// scheme.

max_capacity.description: Maximum total guests this location can seat per reservation time slot. Reservation slots are still generated and bookable when this is left unset (no cap enforced) — set it to actually limit how many guests can book the same time slot.

og_image_asset_id.description: Asset id from get_site_media_assets for this page's social share image. Falls back to hero_image_asset_id, then the site-level og image, if unset.

opening_hours.description: Opening hours for this location. Accepted shapes: (1) an object { weekdayDescriptions: string[] } with one entry per day, e.g. { weekdayDescriptions: ["Monday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM", "Tuesday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM", ...] } — this is also the shape returned by get_location; (2) a plain string with one day per line, e.g. "Monday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM\nTuesday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM". A bare array of per-day structured objects (e.g. { openDay, openTime, closeTime }) is NOT supported — convert to weekdayDescriptions strings first. Pass null to clear.

robots.description: Search engine indexing directive. Leave unset for the default index,follow.

seo_description.description: Optional SEO meta description override. Falls back to the computed default if unset.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override. Falls back to the computed default if unset.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

special_hours.description: A temporary closure or special-hours override for this specific location, e.g. "closed for renovations for two weeks" or "closed until July 17". Shape: { closed: boolean, starts_on?: "YYYY-MM-DD" (defaults to today if omitted), ends_on?: "YYYY-MM-DD" (omit for an indefinite closure), note?: string — a short guest-facing message, e.g. "Closed for renovations — back July 18th!" }. Convert relative durations like "2 weeks" into a concrete ends_on date yourself before calling. This only affects this location's own page, never the site-wide homepage. Pass null for the whole field to clear it and reopen the location.

tiktok_url.description: Full TikTok profile URL for this location, e.g. https://tiktok.com/@yourhandle. Include the https:// scheme.

timezone.description: IANA time zone identifier for this location, e.g. Asia/Bangkok. Used to interpret opening hours and booking slots.

uber_eats_url.description: Uber Eats URL for this location. Must be a full http:// or https:// URL — bare domains are rejected.

cta_type.description: Call-to-action type shown with the post, e.g. "book", "order", "learn_more".

event_end.description: Event end datetime (ISO 8601). Use with post_type "event".

event_start.description: Event start datetime (ISO 8601). Use with post_type "event".

gallery_media.description: Optional ordered gallery media for the public post page. Use active media asset ids from get_site_media_assets or uploaded/generated media.

image_asset_id.description: Optional active image asset id to use as the canonical post cover.

location_id.description: Restrict this post to a specific location. Omit to apply site-wide.

offer_coupon.description: Coupon code for the promotion. Use with post_type "offer".

offer_terms.description: Terms and conditions for the promotion. Use with post_type "offer".

og_image_asset_id.description: Optional Open Graph image asset id. Defaults to the cover image when omitted.

post_type.description: Determines how the post is presented. "offer" = promotion, "event" = scheduled happening.

scheduled_for.description: If set, the post is scheduled to publish at this datetime (ISO 8601) instead of immediately.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title for the public post page.

slug.description: Optional public URL slug. If omitted, KrabiClaw generates a stable unique slug.

matching_policy.description: Controls how strictly the backend validates the Places API result. Defaults to strict coordinate matching.

allow_name_only_fallback.description: If false (default), reject when no coordinates are available to bias the search.

prefer_backend_extraction.description: If true (default), backend URL extraction takes precedence over parsed_hint.

require_coordinate_match.description: If true (default), reject any Places result more than max_distance_km from URL coordinates.

parsed_hint.description: Optional, non-authoritative hints from LLM URL parsing. Backend always re-extracts independently and logs divergence >1 km.

business.description: Parsed business details from Google Places.

missingPhotos.description: True if fewer than 3 photos were imported — prompt the user to upload their own.

orgSlug.description: Organization slug — combine with this site's subdomain and locationSlug from list_locations to build the dashboard URL: https://krabiclaw.com/dashboard/{orgSlug}/sites/{subdomain}/locations/{locationSlug}

images.description: Array of { assetId, publicUrl } returned by save_generated_image or save_generated_image_file.

regenerate_label.description: Optional label for the secondary button.

site_id.description: Required with target. Site ID that owns the target content.

target.description: Optional target that should be updated directly after the user selects an image.

use_label.description: Optional label for the primary button.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

ogImageUrl.description: Hero image URL for the OG preview.

pages.description: Navigable pages shown in the preview tabs.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

first_batch.description: Result of the first processing batch.

domain_id.description: ID of the domain to sync.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

location_id.description: Location to sync page info into. Required to actually update the tenant site.

page_id.description: Switch to a different Facebook Page by ID. Omit to use the currently connected page.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

max_capacity.description: Maximum total guests this location can seat per reservation time slot. Null means no cap is enforced (slots remain bookable).

notification_phone.description: WhatsApp number for internal booking/reservation alerts to this location's manager. Not shown to guests. Falls back to the site-level whatsapp_phone if null.

timezone.description: IANA time zone identifier for this location, e.g. Asia/Bangkok. Used to interpret opening hours and booking slots.

item_id.description: Existing menu item ID when known.

set_missing_unavailable.description: Only true when the user explicitly asks to remove, replace, hide, or make omitted items unavailable.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

document_updated_at.description: Concurrency token required when replacing content_blocks.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

hide_from_nav.description: Excludes this post from nav rendering only. Does NOT deindex it or remove it from the sitemap — use robots="noindex,..." for that.

nav_order.description: Sort position within its section. Lower sorts first.

nav_section.description: Top-level sidebar section label for this site's blog. Falls back to category if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

nav_section_order.description: Sort position of the section itself among all sections.

nav_title.description: Sidebar label override. Falls back to the post title if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

expected_updated_at.description: Optional metadata concurrency token from the post updated_at field.

nav_section_order.description: Sort position of the section itself among all sections.

nav_title.description: Sidebar label override. Falls back to the post title if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

scheduled_for.description: Future ISO 8601 datetime with timezone to schedule publication of the current draft revision; null clears scheduling.

seo_keywords.description: Comma-separated SEO keyword phrases when useful.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO/browser-tab title override. Falls back to the post title if unset.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

slug.description: Manual URL slug override. Published slug changes preserve a permanent redirect by default.

tags.description: Searchable topical tags. Use a short, deduplicated list; category remains the primary public grouping.

document_updated_at.description: Concurrency token required when replacing content_blocks.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

hide_from_nav.description: Excludes this post from nav rendering only. Does NOT deindex it or remove it from the sitemap — use robots="noindex,..." for that.

nav_order.description: Sort position within its section. Lower sorts first.

nav_section.description: Top-level sidebar section label for this site's blog. Falls back to category if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

nav_section_order.description: Sort position of the section itself among all sections.

nav_title.description: Sidebar label override. Falls back to the post title if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

content_blocks.description: Canonical ordered article blocks. Sending this replaces the complete draft block snapshot.

data.description: Typed block payload. Markdown requires markdown plus editor_mode (rich for visual-editor-safe prose, source for tables/raw HTML). FAQ uses items; How-To uses steps; images retain asset_id, alt, caption, and resolved media metadata.

expected_document_updated_at.description: Required with content_blocks. Use document_updated_at returned by get_blog_post; stale tokens are rejected with a conflict.

expected_updated_at.description: Optional metadata concurrency token from the post updated_at field.

scheduled_for.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone. A future value transitions the post to scheduled and snapshots the current draft revision; null clears scheduling.

seo_keywords.description: Comma-separated SEO keyword phrases when useful.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO/browser-tab title override. Falls back to the post title if unset.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

slug.description: Manual URL slug override. Published slug changes preserve a permanent redirect by default.

tags.description: Searchable topical tags. Use a short, deduplicated list; category remains the primary public grouping.

document_updated_at.description: Concurrency token required when replacing content_blocks.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

hide_from_nav.description: Excludes this post from nav rendering only. Does NOT deindex it or remove it from the sitemap — use robots="noindex,..." for that.

nav_order.description: Sort position within its section. Lower sorts first.

nav_section.description: Top-level sidebar section label for this site's blog. Falls back to category if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

nav_section_order.description: Sort position of the section itself among all sections.

nav_title.description: Sidebar label override. Falls back to the post title if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

experience_id.description: Optional experience id when editing an experience-specific policy override.

locale.description: Optional locale code for the rendered preview copy. Defaults to en.

location_id.description: Optional location id when editing a location-scoped reservation or experience default policy.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

available_note.description: Short urgency or availability note, e.g. "Last 2 spots".

body.description: Main long-form description for the experience. Use this for the full narrative, inclusions, what guests can expect, and important details that do not have a dedicated field.

canonical_url.description: Optional canonical URL override. Leave unset for the default self-referencing canonical.

compare_at_price_amount.description: Regular/pre-sale price. Set alongside price_amount to run a sale.

featured.description: Whether this experience should be highlighted in featured placements.

featured_sort_order.description: Lower numbers sort earlier among featured experiences.

highlights.description: Short bullet-point highlights for the experience. Use one concise string per highlight.

image_asset_id.description: Primary image asset id from get_site_media_assets.

images.description: Optional additional media gallery for this experience. Use this for extra photos or videos beyond the primary image/video.

included_items.description: Explicit list of what is included. Use one concise string per included item.

location_id.description: Move this experience to a different location. Omit to leave its current location unchanged — unlike create_experience, omitting this does not fall back to the site primary location.

max_capacity.description: Maximum guest count for a single booking or session.

meeting_point.description: Specific arrival or check-in instruction for guests.

og_image_asset_id.description: Asset id from get_site_media_assets for this experience's social share image. Falls back to the first gallery image, then image_asset_id, if unset.

price.description: Optional display override for pricing text, e.g. "Ask us" or "Free". Leave both price and price_amount unset entirely (not "Ask us") for group/custom-quote experiences — that triggers the public page's "Contact us" inquiry flow instead of a Reserve Now button; setting price to text like "Ask us" instead just shows that text as the price label with normal booking still enabled.

price_amount.description: Numeric price amount when the experience has a concrete price.

recurring_slots.description: Per-weekday time slots in HH:MM format when the schedule differs by day. Keys must be full weekday names such as Monday or Friday. Takes priority over time_slots when set.

robots.description: Search engine indexing directive. Leave unset for the default index,follow.

sale_ends_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale ends. Optional.

sale_starts_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale becomes active. Optional.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

slot_end.description: Convenience: auto-generate slots up to and including this "HH:MM" end time.

slot_interval_minutes.description: Convenience: interval in minutes between generated slots, e.g. 30.

slot_start.description: Convenience: auto-generate slots from this "HH:MM" start time. Used with slot_end and slot_interval_minutes instead of typing time_slots by hand.

slot_weekday.description: If set alongside slot_start/slot_end/slot_interval_minutes, the generated slots are assigned to recurring_slots for this weekday instead of the flat time_slots list.

sort_order.description: Lower numbers sort earlier in lists.

tagline.description: Short one-line hook shown in cards and summaries. Keep this concise; do not dump the full description here.

time_slots.description: Flat daily time slots in HH:MM format, used when the same schedule applies every day. Ignored if recurring_slots is set.

video_asset_id.description: Primary video asset id from get_site_media_assets.

what_to_bring.description: Explicit list of what guests should bring or prepare. Use one concise string per item.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

location_id.description: Optional location scope when the homepage content is location-specific.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

canonical_url.description: Optional canonical URL override. Leave unset for the default self-referencing canonical.

email.description: Public email shown to guests on the website and in booking/reservation confirmation emails. Pass null to clear it.

facebook_url.description: Full Facebook page URL for this location, e.g. https://facebook.com/yourpage. Include the https:// scheme.

foodpanda_url.description: Foodpanda URL for this location. Must be a full http:// or https:// URL — bare domains are rejected.

grab_url.description: Grab delivery/booking URL for this location. Must be a full http:// or https:// URL — bare domains are rejected.

hero_image_asset_id.description: Asset ID from get_site_media_assets. Assigns the hero image for this location.

hero_video_asset_id.description: Asset ID from get_site_media_assets. Assigns the hero video for this location.

instagram_url.description: Full Instagram profile URL for this location, e.g. https://instagram.com/yourhandle. Include the https:// scheme.

location_id.description: Location id or slug.

max_capacity.description: Maximum total guests this location can seat per reservation time slot. Reservation slots are still generated and bookable when this is left unset (no cap enforced) — set it to actually limit how many guests can book the same time slot. Pass null to clear it.

notification_phone.description: WhatsApp number for internal booking/reservation alerts to this location's manager. Not shown to guests. Falls back to the site-level whatsapp_phone if null. International format: +66812345678

og_image_asset_id.description: Asset id from get_site_media_assets for this page's social share image. Falls back to hero_image_asset_id, then the site-level og image, if unset.

opening_hours.description: Opening hours for this location. Accepted shapes: (1) an object { weekdayDescriptions: string[] } with one entry per day, e.g. { weekdayDescriptions: ["Monday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM", "Tuesday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM", ...] } — this is also the shape returned by get_location; (2) a plain string with one day per line, e.g. "Monday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM\nTuesday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM". A bare array of per-day structured objects (e.g. { openDay, openTime, closeTime }) is NOT supported — convert to weekdayDescriptions strings first. Pass null to clear.

phone.description: Public phone number shown to guests on the website and in booking/reservation confirmation emails.

robots.description: Search engine indexing directive. Leave unset for the default index,follow.

seo_description.description: Optional SEO meta description override. Falls back to the computed default if unset.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override. Falls back to the computed default if unset.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

special_hours.description: A temporary closure or special-hours override for this specific location, e.g. "closed for renovations for two weeks" or "closed until July 17". Shape: { closed: boolean, starts_on?: "YYYY-MM-DD" (defaults to today if omitted), ends_on?: "YYYY-MM-DD" (omit for an indefinite closure), note?: string — a short guest-facing message, e.g. "Closed for renovations — back July 18th!" }. Convert relative durations like "2 weeks" into a concrete ends_on date yourself before calling. This only affects this location's own page, never the site-wide homepage. Pass null for the whole field to clear it and reopen the location.

tiktok_url.description: Full TikTok profile URL for this location, e.g. https://tiktok.com/@yourhandle. Include the https:// scheme.

timezone.description: IANA time zone identifier for this location, e.g. Asia/Bangkok. Used to interpret opening hours and booking slots.

uber_eats_url.description: Uber Eats URL for this location. Must be a full http:// or https:// URL — bare domains are rejected.

answer.description: Answer text. Pass null to clear it.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

canonical_url.description: Optional canonical URL override. Leave unset for the default self-referencing canonical.

compare_at_price_amount.description: Regular/pre-sale price. Set alongside price_amount to run a sale.

og_image_asset_id.description: Asset id from get_site_media_assets for this page's social share image. Falls back to image_asset_id, then the site-level og image, if unset.

price.description: Legacy alias accepted for compatibility. Prefer price_amount.

price_amount.description: Canonical price field for menu items.

robots.description: Search engine indexing directive. Leave unset for the default index,follow.

sale_ends_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale ends. Optional.

sale_starts_at.description: ISO 8601 date/time the sale becomes active. Optional.

seo_description.description: Optional SEO meta description override. Falls back to the computed default if unset.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override. Falls back to the computed default if unset.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

channels.description: Owner alert channels. Use one or both of email and whatsapp.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

whatsapp_phone.description: Site-level WhatsApp number for owner alerts. Omit to leave unchanged.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

cta_type.description: Call-to-action type shown with the post, e.g. "book", "order", "learn_more".

cta_url.description: URL the call-to-action button links to.

event_end.description: Event end datetime (ISO 8601). Use with post_type "event".

event_start.description: Event start datetime (ISO 8601). Use with post_type "event".

gallery_media.description: Replace the ordered public post gallery. Omit to leave unchanged.

image_asset_id.description: Active image asset id for the canonical post cover. Pass null to clear it.

location_id.description: Restrict this post to a specific location. Pass null to clear it.

offer_coupon.description: Coupon code for the promotion. Use with post_type "offer".

offer_terms.description: Terms and conditions for the promotion. Use with post_type "offer".

post_type.description: Determines how the post is presented. "offer" = promotion, "event" = scheduled happening.

scheduled_for.description: If set, the post is scheduled to publish at this datetime (ISO 8601) instead of immediately.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

slug.description: Public URL slug. Pass null or omit to keep the current slug; pass a string to change it.

compliance.description: Canonical organization/compliance data used by every professional-service surface and its schema.org graph.

entity_type.description: Schema.org type name such as LegalService or AccountingService.

founding_date.description: ISO calendar date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

nonprofit_status.description: Recognized schema.org nonprofit enumeration URL or a normalizable form such as 501(c)(3).

same_as.description: Absolute HTTP(S) social or identity profile URLs.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

canonical_url.description: Optional site-wide canonical URL override for the homepage.

contact_email.description: Public contact email shown to guests. Pass null to clear it.

og_image_asset_id.description: Asset id from get_site_media_assets used as the default social share image site-wide when a page has no more specific image set.

robots.description: Search engine indexing directive for the homepage. Leave unset for the default index,follow.

seo_description.description: Optional site-wide default SEO description override. Falls back to brand_description if unset.

seo_title.description: Optional site-wide default SEO title override for the homepage and any page without its own override. Falls back to brand_name if unset.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

social_facebook.description: Full Facebook page URL, e.g. https://facebook.com/yourpage. Must include the https:// scheme — bare domains or handles are rejected.

social_instagram.description: Full Instagram profile URL, e.g. https://instagram.com/yourhandle. Must include the https:// scheme — bare domains or handles are rejected.

social_tiktok.description: Full TikTok profile URL, e.g. https://tiktok.com/@yourhandle. Must include the https:// scheme — bare domains or handles are rejected.

category.description: What this media will be used for.

description.description: Description of the media (stored as alt text).

file.description: Authorized file reference supplied by ChatGPT after rewriting the declared top-level file argument, including a temporary download_url and file_id.

file_id.description: Resolved file identifier for a user-uploaded image, video, or Markdown document (e.g. file_abc123). Prefer file when the host can supply the filename directly.

poster_file.description: Optional poster/thumbnail image for a video upload. Ignored for image uploads.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

category.description: What this photo will be used for.

description.description: Description of the photo (stored as alt text).

file.description: Authorized file reference supplied by ChatGPT after rewriting the declared top-level file argument, including a temporary download_url and file_id.

file_id.description: Resolved file identifier for a user-uploaded image (e.g. file_abc123). Prefer this when the host can supply it directly.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.

fallback_enabled.description: Whether to fall back to the source locale for untranslated fields. Defaults to true.

is_source.description: Mark this as the site's source locale. Forces status to published.

site_id.description: Site id, subdomain, or custom domain.
